faq.title: Quick Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: Short and clear answers before you start.

items.question: Are contracts officially approved?
items.answer: Yes, all contracts are documented through the Ejar platform and compliant with official regulations.

items.question: What is Aqadi platform?
items.answer: Aqadi is a licensed electronic platform by Ejar network and the Real Estate General Authority, enabling you to issue and document residential and commercial contracts in about 30 minutes.

items.question: How can you contact support?
items.answer: You can contact us directly via WhatsApp, and our support team responds within minutes all week.
